action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate stable at 0.646 (best), strong on 7/10 envs (DoorKey/FourRooms/KeyCorridor/Lava*/Unlock/DistShift near 1.0) but still 0.0 on LockedRoom/Dynamic-Obstacles/MultiRoom-N4-S5 after 105M+ steps; post-eval ~0.64 with variance due to seed sampling; training stable at ~4400fps. Analysis: FlatObs+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO multi-task with bias has transferred well but the 3 hardest long-horizon/sparse tasks need more dedicated samples (current bias insufficient); ~16min time left means max ~2M steps safely (avoids timeout). Decision: Heavily bias training_env_ids to ONLY the 3 failing envs (cycled across 16 vecs), continue from checkpoint with lower lr=5e-5 for fine-tuning, 2M steps in 500k chunks w/ frequent metrics logging (n_ep=3 periodic, n=10 final) to target weaknesses and generate curves; submit_eval immediately after.
